description_long: This is a potted flowering plant with broad, dark green leaves arranged in a dense, layered rosette. The leaves are thick, slightly textured, and have a matte finish, with some overlapping at the edges. At the center and upper surface of the foliage, clusters of small, vibrant blue to violet flowers with yellow centers are visible, each flower having five rounded petals. The flowers are grouped closely together, creating a striking contrast against the green leaves. The plant is housed in a simple, brown, cylindrical pot that appears to be made of clay or plastic. This type of plant is commonly seen as a decorative element in urban environments such as windowsills, patios, or public parks.
description: A potted plant with broad green leaves and clusters of small blue-violet flowers with yellow centers, set in a brown pot. The dense foliage and vibrant flowers make it a popular decorative choice.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dense arrangement of green leaves and a prominent cluster of blue-violet flowers at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered leaves and the spread of flower clusters across the top foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view with more leaves visible and some flowers partially obscured by the foliage.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the overlapping leaves and a clear display of the flower cluster from the side.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with each flower displaying five rounded petals symmetrically radiating from the center. The flowers are grouped in dense clusters, with some overlapping and layering visible.
